label: Canva — Design Editor
description: Canva — online graphic design platform. Drag-and-drop editor, template library, brand kits. React SPA. Login required. Used for creating social media graphics, presentations, documents.
source_patterns: Login (email/Google/SSO) → Dashboard with templates and recent designs
Create design from template: pick category → browse → click template → wait 2-4s editor load
Editor workspace: canvas area with drag handles, left panel (elements/text/uploads), top toolbar
Text tool: click text → type label (short) → font/style/color adjustments → click away
Element drag: grab from panel → drag to canvas → snap positioning — slower precise mouse
Upload: click Uploads → file picker → wait upload → drag to canvas
Export/Download: click Share → Download → pick format (PNG/PDF/...) → wait render → save
Brand Kit: navigate to Brand → set colors/fonts/logos → apply to designs
Team collaboration: invite members → shared folders → comment on designs

active_hours.description: Business hours, creative work; also evening for social media content

scroll.description: Template browsing — visual scanning, moderate passes. React virtual list rendering

mouse.description: Designer speed — moderate-slow, precise targeting for drag-and-drop and canvas manipulation

platform_specific.sequence_hint: login → browse templates (3-4 passes) → select template → wait editor load → canvas: drag elements, add text → edit styling → export/download
